keys.description: Issuing bodies whose certifications may be auto-verified without admin review (e.g. tenant's internal training certifications). Empty by default — every cert requires manual review. Tenant may opt in via settings.

When true (default), fresh CoachingProfile rows require admin verify before assignments can be created. When false (self-serve tenants), profiles are auto-verified on create — the assignment observer relaxes its verified_by_admin_at check.
Wave 4+: Map of issuing_body slug -> webhook URL for automated verification (e.g. 'ussf' -> 'https://verify.ussoccer.com/api/v1/verify'). Empty by default; Wave 4 adds federation-specific pilots.
Days-before-expiry at which to fire CoachCertificationExpiringSoon. 0 fires CoachCertificationExpired instead. Tenant may customize (e.g. add 180-day preview).
Days-before-assignment.end_date at which to fire CoachAssignmentEndingSoon. Coach may plan for the transition.
Max concurrent active assignments per coaching_profile_id. 0 = unlimited. When > 0, the observer refuses new assignments once the count is reached.
Max active assistant_coach assignments on a single Session / Team / Event. Head coach is separate + always 1.

When false (default), the AssignmentConflictDetector flags assignments whose Session times overlap other active assignments for the same coach. Admins may override with intent — the assignment lands but with `has_conflict=true` metadata + a soft-warn event.
Years after rated_at at which the rating auto-expires. 0 = never expire. Enterprise with coaching_extended_retention default is 5 years.
Default rating_scale when the admin doesn't select one. Options: stars_1_5, level_5_stage.
When true, availability_json must cover every day-of-week (Mon-Sun) with at least an empty array []. When false (default), missing days imply 'unavailable' — no validation.
Years past CoachingProfileDeactivated at which the row becomes eligible for hard-purge. 10 with coaching_extended_retention entitlement.
Years past CoachCertificationExpired at which the cert becomes eligible for hard-purge.
Years past rated_at at which the rating becomes eligible for hard-purge. 5 with coaching_extended_retention.
